title: Skincare Set Slam Dunk Face Moisturizer+ Bounce Back Balancing Facial Toner Mist + Morning Rays Brightening Eye Cream, Made with Vitamin E + Aloe Vera Juice for Normal to Dry Skin
features: 【All-In-One Skincare Regimen】: Embrace a complete skincare solution with our Skincare set, which includes the Slam Dunk Face Moisturizer, Morning Rays Brightening Eye Cream, and Refreshing Spray. This trio works in harmony to hydrate, protect, and revitalize your skin, leaving it with a balanced and radiant glow suitable for all skin types.

【Brightening and Soothing Eye Care】: Address the delicate area around your eyes with our Morning Rays Brightening Eye Cream. Infused with Vitamin C and Turmeric Extract, it diminishes dark circles and puffiness, while Green Tea Extract calms and soothes. Your eyes will look refreshed and awake, ready to take on the day.

【Matte Finish Hydration】: Keep your skin hydrated without the shine using our Refreshing Spray. Enriched with Sea Water and Willow Bark Extract, it helps to mattify skin tone and minimize the appearance of pores. The formula's vitamins and essential fatty acids ensure your skin remains soft and moisturized.

【Nourishing Moisture】: The Slam Dunk Face Moisturizer is your go-to for deep hydration. Crafted with Vitamin E, Aloe Vera Juice, and Avocado Oil, it provides your skin with the nourishment it craves, leaving it smooth, supple, and glowing, even for those with normal to dry skin types.

【Convenient and Effective Use】: For a revitalized complexion, apply the Morning Rays Brightening Eye Cream gently around the eyes. Refresh and tone your skin throughout the day with a few spritzes of the Refreshing Spray from a distance, and follow up with the Slam Dunk Face Moisturizer to lock in the benefits. Don't forget to apply sunscreen during the day for complete skin protection.
description: Product description 1 Directions After cleansing, apply the Morning Rays Brightening Eye Cream by gently tapping around the under-eye area. Follow with the Slam Dunk Face Moisturizer. Finish the skincare routine with the refreshing spray for an extra boost of hydration.

specifications_table.Container Type: Bottle, Spray Bottle, Tube or Jar
